zh: 当他们找到她时，她已经在山里迷路了三天了。
en: When they found her, she had been lost in the mountains for three days.

zh: 在他找到工作之前，他已经求职了六个月了。
en: He had been looking for a job for six months before he found one.

zh: 当医生到达时，病人已经等了两个小时了。
en: When the doctor arrived, the patient had been waiting for two hours.

zh: 在她出版小说之前，她已经写了十年了。
en: She had been writing for ten years before she published her novel.

zh: 当比赛结束时，他们已经踢了九十分钟了。
en: When the match ended, they had been playing for ninety minutes.

zh: 在他们修好管道之前，水已经漏了好几天了。
en: The water had been leaking for several days before they fixed the pipe.

zh: 当我们到达时，他们已经等了一个多小时了。
en: When we arrived, they had been waiting for over an hour.

zh: 在她康复之前，她已经生病了好几个星期了。
en: She had been ill for several weeks before she recovered.

zh: 当他终于睡着时，他已经辗转反侧了好几个小时了。
en: When he finally fell asleep, he had been tossing and turning for hours.

zh: 在他们解决问题之前，他们已经讨论了好几天了。
en: They had been discussing the problem for days before they solved it.

zh: 当她意识到错误时，她已经走错路走了一个小时了。
en: When she realized the mistake, she had been going the wrong way for an hour.

zh: 在他们建成这座桥之前，工人们已经工作了两年了。
en: The workers had been working for two years before they finished the bridge.

zh: 当警察抓住他时，他已经逃跑了好几天了。
en: When the police caught him, he had been on the run for several days.

zh: 在她找到钥匙之前，她已经找了半个小时了。
en: She had been searching for half an hour before she found her keys.

zh: 当他们宣布结果时，选手们已经等待了好几个小时了。
en: The contestants had been waiting for hours when the results were announced.

zh: 他的手很脏，因为他一直在修车。
en: His hands were dirty because he had been repairing the car.

zh: 她的眼睛很红，因为她一直在哭。
en: Her eyes were red because she had been crying.

zh: 他很疲惫，因为他一直在加班。
en: He was exhausted because he had been working overtime.

zh: 她满头大汗，因为她一直在跑步。
en: She was sweating because she had been running.

zh: 房间里烟雾弥漫，因为有人一直在抽烟。
en: The room was smoky because someone had been smoking.

zh: 地板很湿，因为孩子们一直在玩水。
en: The floor was wet because the children had been playing with water.

zh: 他的声音很沙哑，因为他一直在大声唱歌。
en: His voice was hoarse because he had been singing loudly.

zh: 她很兴奋，因为她一直在期待这次旅行。
en: She was excited because she had been looking forward to the trip.

zh: 他们很饿，因为他们一直在工作，没有吃东西。
en: They were hungry because they had been working without eating.

zh: 她的手指很痛，因为她一直在打字。
en: Her fingers were sore because she had been typing.

zh: 在他们相遇之前，他已经在那个城市生活了五年了。
en: He had been living in that city for five years before they met.

zh: 在她换工作之前，她已经在那家公司工作了八年了。
en: She had been working at that company for eight years before she changed jobs.

zh: 在他们搬家之前，他们已经在那个社区住了二十年了。
en: They had been living in that neighborhood for twenty years before they moved.

zh: 在他退休之前，他已经教书教了三十年了。
en: He had been teaching for thirty years before he retired.

zh: 在她终于学会开车之前，她已经练习了好几个月了。
en: She had been practicing for months before she finally learned to drive.
